message:
style(search/query): rustfmt tool-ack regression test

Minor reflow of the tool-invocation content literal and the
projected_minimal_fields_search_hit() call in
hit_is_noise_still_suppresses_real_tool_invocation_noise_when_content_present —
brings both under the 100-col budget. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
